description: atHome.lu is a Luxembourg real-estate marketplace for property sales and rentals, with listings across Luxembourg and parts of the Greater Region. It also offers services for real-estate professionals such as advertising and property data offerings.
summary: athome.lu exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp-server.prd.athome.lu/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain.
